title: Animalia
description: Simple plugin that encourages better treatment of farm animals
body: # Animalia ## Description **Modifies baby animal growth time based on various conditions to encourage players to treat their farm animals better.** Baby animals will emit particles on birth to signify that they were affected by the environment. ## Features ### Petting You can right click valid animals (wolves, cats, pigs, cows, chickens, horses, sheep, etc.) to pet them. Petting gives the animal 1 second of regeneration and has a 5 second cooldown. ### Goat Additions Adult goats now drop 1-2 mutton on death. There is a 1 in 20 chance for a goat to drop cheese (pumpkin pie) ### Hay Animals that eat hay will have their growth time halved if born within 5 blocks of a hay block. ### Chicken Farm Prevention Chickens hatched beneath lava will have their growth time doubled. ### Pigs Pigs born above mud or podzol will have 7 minutes removed from their growth time. ### Claustrophobia Animals in tight spaces will have 15 minutes added to their growth time. ### Water Animals not born within 10 blocks of a water source block or cauldron filled with water take 10 more minutes to mature. **NOTE: This plugin was tested on Paper 1.21.4, functionality in other versions is plausible but not guaranteed.** Icon from game-icons.net licensed under [CC-BY 3.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/)
